arts.sum: Arsenal’s WCL glory | Sunderland up | Dons win Cup Live scores | Fixtures | Tables | And get in touch It’s 20 years since Istanbul: just say the word and everyone knows what you’re talking about. I’d like the following: the verdict on your side’s campaign, your favourite moment, and predictions for next season (winner, relegated sides, best player). Continue reading...
